zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela FitzWalter於大約1236年出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，她的父親Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow19歲，母親Ida Longespée The Younger16歲。她於大約1264年與Sir William de Odingsells II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年1月7日之後，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela FitzWalter于大约1236年出生在英国艾可馬爾頓时，她的父亲Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow19岁，母亲Ida Longespée The Younger16岁。她于大约1264年与Sir William de Odingsells II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1311年1月7日之后，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela FitzWalter was born about 1236, in Maldon, Essex, England, her father, Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow, was 19 and her mother, Ida Longespée The Younger, was 16. She married Sir William de Odingsells II about 1264. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 7 January 1311, and was buried in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela FitzWalter est née environ 1236, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Ida Longespée The Younger, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Odingsells II environ 1264. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 7 janvier 1311, et a été enterrée à Wroxall, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela FitzWalter um 1236 in Maldon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow 19 und ihre Mutter Ida Longespée The Younger 16. Sie hat um 1264 Sir William de Odingsells II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 7. Januar 1311 und wurde in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir William de Odingsells II circa 1264. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 7 gennaio 1311, e fu sepolta a Wroxall, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela FitzWalterが約1236年にイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmowは19歳，母Ida Longespée The Youngerは16歳であった。約1264年にSir William de Odingsells IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1311年1月7日以後に死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウロクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1236년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida Longespée The Younger(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1264년 Sir William de Odingsells II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 1월 7일 이후 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 록스알에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela FitzWalter nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Ida Longespée The Younger, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Odingsells II aproximadamente 1264. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 7 de janeiro de 1311, e foi sepultada em Wroxall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela FitzWalter родилась около 1236 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter FitzRobert Baron of Little Dunmow было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida Longespée The Younger, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Odingsells II около 1264 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 7 январь 1311 г. и была похоронена в местности роксалл, варвиккшир, Англия.
